firstTime.heroDescription: Clear your doubts. Straight answers to everything you want to know before you start.
firstTime.q1: I've never trained martial arts before. Will I be lost?
firstTime.a1:
No.
Many people start here from zero.
Classes are in groups, but there's always close guidance.
We explain the basics, correct technique and truly follow up.
firstTime.q2: I haven't exercised in a long time. Will I be able to keep up?
firstTime.a2:
Of course, you go at your own pace.
There's no obligation to keep up with those who've been training for years.
Intensity is adjusted.
The important thing is to start.
firstTime.a3:
Training is technical and supervised.
Intensity comes after control.
And sparring is not mandatory.
Only those who want to participate, when they feel ready.
firstTime.q4: I don't want to compete. I just want to train.
firstTime.a4:
No worries.
Most of our members don't compete.
They come to train, evolve and leave better than they came in.
firstTime.q5: I don't like gyms. I always feel alone.
firstTime.a5:
Here you don't walk in, put on headphones and leave.
You train in a group, with constant guidance.

Over time, you build relationships with those who train beside you.
There's a team atmosphere.
firstTime.a6:
For your first class, just show up with the will to train.
We take care of the rest.

If you continue, we'll choose your equipment together, no rush.
firstTime.a7:
Yes.
You train, shower and carry on with your day.

community.heroTitle:
Serious environment.
Light energy.
Strong community.
community.manifesto: Real octagon. High-level structure. Open to anyone who decides to evolve — from zero to advanced.
community.paragraph1: Striker's House is not a conventional gym. It's a space where fighters, executives, expats and students share the same mat. Different lives, one discipline.
community.paragraph2: We don't separate people by ego, age or background. We bring them together through structure, respect and consistency. Because real strength is built over time.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.description: Training is taken seriously. No shortcuts, no excuses. Commitment to the process.

respect.title: Respect
respect.description: Everyone started from zero. No one is judged. Respect is the foundation of everything.

consistency.title: Consistency
consistency.description: Results come from those who show up. Day after day. Training after training.

evolution.title: Evolution
evolution.description: From zero to advanced. Each at their own pace, all evolving.

diversity.title: Diversity & Inclusion
diversity.text: At Striker's House, we are committed to promoting diversity and inclusion. We believe everyone should have the same opportunity to train, regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation or ability.
diversity.commitment: Our mat is a place of equality. Here, the only criteria are respect and the will to evolve.

corporate.heroSubtitle: Unique team building experiences through combat sports. Strengthen your team in a controlled, professional environment.
corporate.whySubtitle: Shared challenges create stronger bonds than any conventional team building activity.

teamwork.title: Teamwork
teamwork.description: Training together builds trust and communication that transfers directly to the workplace.

trust.title: Trust
trust.description: Trusting your training partner teaches you to trust your colleagues. Shared vulnerability unites teams.

challenge.title: Shared Challenge
challenge.description: Pushing limits together creates deeper bonds than any conventional workshop.

wellness.title: Wellness
wellness.description: Combat stress, improve focus and elevate team energy through movement.

corporate.facilityP1: A professional space with a real octagon, high-quality equipment and internationally experienced coaches. A controlled and safe environment for all experience levels.
corporate.facilityP2: Our coaches adapt each session to the group, ensuring everyone participates regardless of fitness level. From executives to development teams, we've hosted groups from all industries.
corporate.facilityQuote: True leadership is built in shared discomfort.

offsite.title: Corporate Off-Site
offsite.description: Half-day or full-day combat experience for your team.

teamBuilding.title: Team Building
teamBuilding.description: Regular sessions for teams who want to train together.

wellness.title: Wellness Program
wellness.description: Corporate wellness through martial arts and conditioning.

corporate.ctaDescription: Every event is tailor-made. Tell us about your team and we'll propose the ideal experience.

whyDifferent.subtitle: Why we're different
whyDifferent.p1: Striker's House was born from another idea. A space with light, with respect, with people who greet each other by name.
whyDifferent.p2: Kids, seniors, moms who've never trained, executives, athletes preparing for competition, women in women-only classes.
whyDifferent.p3: Discipline comes naturally when training stops feeling like a punishment.
whyDifferent.quote: An environment where I've felt at home since day 1

kids.subtitle: Kids Program
kids.description1: At Striker's House Kids, martial arts is a tool for growth.
kids.description2: Through structured training, children develop focus, respect, coordination, and self-control in a safe and disciplined environment.

footer.description: A private training space for those who take the art seriously.
footer.city: R. Itália 2a 1 andar sala G, 2775-604 Carcavelos

page.heroDescription:
Train like a fighter.
Live like yourself.

benefits.focusDesc: Clarity and discipline in daily life
benefits.communityDesc: Be part of a warrior family

page.videoDescription: See the atmosphere, the training and the community waiting for you.
page.modalitiesDescription: Try everything. Discover your passion. No extra cost.

boxing.name: Boxing
boxing.description: The noble art. Develop quick reflexes, sharp focus and unshakeable confidence.

muayThai.name: Muay Thai
muayThai.description: The art of 8 limbs. Complete training using fists, elbows, knees and shins.

bjj.name: BJJ
bjj.description: Human chess. Technique beats strength - dominate any opponent on the ground.

mma.name: MMA
mma.description: The best of all arts. Combines striking and grappling in a complete workout.

page.plansDescription: No contracts. No commitments. Start your transformation today.
page.tryFreeClass: Try a free class. No commitment. See for yourself.
page.faqDescription: Everything you need to know before you start

classes.title: About Classes
classes.a1: Our classes are 60 minutes long, including warm-up, main training and final stretches.
classes.a2: No! All our classes are adapted for all levels. Coaches will guide you from day one, regardless of your experience.
classes.a3: Classes have between 8 to 15 people, ensuring personalized attention from the coach.
classes.q4: What should I bring to my first class?
classes.a4: Comfortable sportswear, water bottle and towel. All equipment (gloves, wraps) is provided for beginners.

modalities.title: Modalities
modalities.a1: Boxing, Muay Thai, Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu (BJJ), MMA and functional training. All plans include access to all modalities.
modalities.a2: Yes! We encourage you to try them all. Many of our students combine Boxing with BJJ, or Muay Thai with functional training.
modalities.a3: Yes, all classes are mixed. We also have specific schedules for women in some modalities.

enrollment.title: Enrollment & Payment
enrollment.q1: Is there a contract or commitment?
enrollment.a1: No! Monthly plans have no commitment. You can cancel at any time. Quarterly, semi-annual and annual plans have discounts but require the period commitment.
enrollment.q2: What does the enrollment fee include?
enrollment.a2: Enrollment includes initial physical assessment, welcome kit (t-shirt and wraps), and personalized guidance in the first month.
enrollment.a3: Payment is made online via credit/debit card or MB Way. After payment, you receive email confirmation and can start immediately.
enrollment.a4: Yes, you can pause up to 30 days per year (vacation, injury, etc). Contact us via WhatsApp to activate the pause.

facilities.title: Facilities
facilities.a1: We are located in an easily accessible area, with free parking nearby. The exact address is sent after enrollment.
facilities.q2: Do you have locker rooms and showers?
facilities.a2: Yes, complete locker rooms with lockers, showers and hair dryers.
facilities.a3: Monday to Friday 7am to 10pm, Saturdays 9am to 2pm. Check the class schedule on our website.

page.scheduleDescription: Check our full schedule and book your class.
page.finalCtaDescription: The only thing separating you from the best version of yourself is the first step.

tryNow.whatsappMessage: Hi! I'd like to try a free class at Striker's House.
tryNow.heroDescription: Book your trial class and experience Boxing, Muay Thai or MMA. No commitment, no equipment needed.

features.1: No commitment — come try with no charge
features.3: All levels — from beginner to advanced

welcome.subtitle: Welcome, new Striker!
welcome.title: First time?
welcome.description: At Striker's House there's no reception desk. Walk in like it's your home and check yourself in — it's quick and easy. Your coach will have gloves ready and will show you everything you need to know.

app.title: Download the app
app.description: At Striker's House you manage your experience. Book your classes and manage your plans in our app.

reviewsSection.subtitle: The most recommended training in Cascais

reviews.1: Incredible atmosphere and coach Marcelo is amazing. You feel at home from day one.
reviews.2: Never thought I'd love Muay Thai this much. Classes are intense but super fun!
reviews.3: Best martial arts gym in Cascais. Quality equipment and great people.
reviews.4: Started with zero experience and in 2 months I feel like a different person. Highly recommend!
reviews.5: Been training here for 6 months. The energy in classes is addictive, can't stop.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.address:
R. Itália 2A, 1º andar, sala G
2775-604 Carcavelos, Cascais, Portugal

s1.title: 1. Who We Are
s1.p1: Striker's House – Associação Desportiva (hereinafter "Striker's House") is the entity responsible for processing personal data collected in the context of its activities, including:
s1.p2: We comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and all applicable Portuguese legislation.

payment.title: Payment Data
payment.note: Card details are not stored by Striker's House when payments are processed via third-party providers.

health.title: Health Data (when applicable)
items: Medical information relevant to safe sports practice

s3.title: 3. Purpose of Data Processing
s3.p1: We process your data for the following purposes:
items: Invoicing and compliance with tax obligations
Communication regarding schedules, updates, and events
Insurance management in case of accident
s3.p2: Your data will never be used for purposes incompatible with those for which it was collected.

s4.title: 4. Legal Basis
s4.p2: You may withdraw your consent at any time.

s5.title: 5. Data Retention
items: Active members: for the duration of the contractual relationship
Marketing data: until consent is withdrawn
Inactive members: up to 2 years after termination

s6.title: 6. Data Sharing
s6.p1: Data may be shared, when necessary, with:
items: Member management platforms (e.g., YogoBooking or equivalent)
s6.p2: Some providers may be located outside the European Economic Area. In such cases, appropriate safeguards are applied.

s7.title: 7. Security
s7.p1: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures, including:

s8.title: 8. Data Subject Rights
s8.p2: You may lodge a complaint with the Portuguese Data Protection Authority (CNPD – www.cnpd.pt).

s9.title: 9. Minors
s9.p1: Services are not intended for individuals under 16 years old without parental or legal guardian consent.

s10.title: 10. Cookies
s10.p1: The website may use essential, performance, and marketing cookies (subject to consent).

s11.title: 11. Changes
s11.p1: We reserve the right to update this Policy whenever necessary. The most recent version will always be available on our website.
